strengths: Versatile full-stack builder: deep hands-on experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Strong software engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, code quality focus throughout career
Open-source leadership and mentoring: sustained GISCollective development, testing libraries, and community workshops
concerns: Minimal AI/ML background: no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms; recent MCP work at re:cinq (< 3 months) is tooling-focused, not strategic AI work
No strategic or director-level experience: career focused on senior IC technical work with no customer advisory, strategic partnerships, or platform direction-setting
Cloud platform architecture expertise insufficient: AWS/Docker/Kubernetes tooling experience, but no demonstrated multi-cloud strategy, platform design, or cloud-native architecture at scale

key_factors.factor: AI/ML domain expertise and demonstrated products
Strategic leadership and customer advisory experience
Cloud platform architecture and strategy depth

response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with strong software craftsmanship and approximately 14–17 years of technical experience, but this is not a fit for a director-level AI strategy role. His career has focused on hands-on development and tooling with no demonstrated AI/ML products, strategic customer advisory, or platform architecture experience. The role fundamentally requires deep AI/ML expertise and strategic leadership—areas where he has minimal background. His profile is that of a skilled senior engineer, not a principal-level strategic leader in cloud and AI.
